name: Editorial Team
shortBio: An editorial desk focused on practical China trip planning for first-time international visitors.
fullBio: The Editorial Team reviews city guides, trip basics, and route-planning pages with a practical first-time visitor lens. The goal is to turn useful Chinese-language travel knowledge and booking realities into clearer English planning advice.
reviewProcess: Pages are researched, translated or drafted with AI assistance where helpful, then reviewed for clarity, route logic, and whether the advice still makes sense for first-time visitors.
seoDescription: Meet the editorial team behind China Travel Notes and see how city guides and planning articles are reviewed.
